Actions.Text: AMEND AND RECOMMIT TO ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT
AMEND AND RECOMMIT TO ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT

Title: Relates to limiting prohibitions of advertising of cannabis products or services on billboards
Summary: Relates to requirements for advertising of cannabis licensees, products or services on billboards; limits information that may appear on billboards.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the cannabis law, in relation to limiting prohibitions of advertising of cannabis products or services on billboards
